overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a Japanese-inspired shrine area overgrown with vegetation, transitioning from an outdoor dirt path through a red torii gate into a gravel courtyard, and finally entering a covered pavilion containing a holographic braindance terminal. The scene blends traditional Japanese architecture with futuristic cyberpunk elements under warm afternoon sunlight.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along an overgrown dirt path flanked by dense grass and traditional stone lanterns, approaching a large red torii gate. Traditional wooden shrine buildings line both sides while a tall futuristic communication tower rises in the background, establishing the cyberpunk setting.

events.description: passing through the torii gate from the overgrown path into the open gravel courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across the gravel courtyard, passing by NPCs seated on benches to the right side

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the torii gate, the scene opens into a sunlit gravel courtyard lined with concrete benches. Several NPCs in colorful outfits are seated on the right, while futuristic elements like a vending machine and advertisement poster appear on the left, contrasting with the traditional architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered pavilion with concrete flooring and potted bamboo plants, where the lighting shifts to a softer, shaded quality. A futuristic holographic terminal with glowing blue elements becomes visible ahead as the camera moves deeper into the shrine complex.

entered.detail: large glowing blue spherical hologram with electrical energy patterns and data displays

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a glowing blue holographic braindance orb mounted on a stone pedestal within the covered pavilion. The futuristic interface displays electrical energy patterns while the open courtyard remains visible through the pavilion entrance behind the terminal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an overgrown traditional pathway into a shaded pavilion housing futuristic technology. It begins with a walk along a dirt path flanked by stone lanterns and dense grass, moving toward a large red torii gate while a towering communication tower looms in the distance. As the camera passes through the gate, the scene opens into a sunlit gravel courtyard where colorful NPCs and modern vending machines contrast with the surrounding wooden shrine architecture. The movement then shifts into a semi-covered pavilion, where the bright daylight gives way to softer shadows and potted bamboo plants. Finally, the camera approaches a glowing blue holographic braindance orb mounted on a stone pedestal, with the open courtyard remaining visible in the distance behind the shimmering interface.
